the_transformation_set: Shape-shifting frequencies in the Monster's gut / Every door open, every window shut
Monster 7 turning into fractal air / Searching for the logic that is never there
Wavetable position: moving through the core / Becoming the sound that I wasn't before
the_metallic_screams_set: FM-synthesis, biting through the soul / Taking the machine, taking the control
Metallic voices in the Phrygian dark / Fanning the flame of the digital spark
Phase-distortion: warping the reality / Breaking the chains of the three-D causality
the_fusion_dialogue: Morphing the silence / Morphing the noise
Finding the balance / Finding the voice
